events.message: While a ready enemy (Corpse-Hungry Ghoul) was engaged, I took two separate non-fight actions (Investigate, then Take Resource) in one turn. Each provoked an Attack of Opportunity and the enemy attacked BOTH times. Per rules an enemy that makes an attack of opportunity becomes exhausted and cannot attack again until it readies, so the second AoO attack should not have happened. Engine appears not to exhaust enemies after an AoO attack.
